name_en: Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Small Shopping Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.
name_cn:
Goyard Jet Black Limited Edition Saint Louis Small Shopping Bag, made of new Goyardine space black canvas, unlined, soft and lightweight, reversible, front is Goyardine canvas, other side is cotton-linen knit. Two leather handles taper from thin to thick, support multiple carrying methods. It comes with a removable inner bag, hanging on one handle for quick access.
28 cm x 15 cm x 34 cm
🔎020146M-Space Black
